hero.title: Packers & Movers in Jammu
hero.subtitle: Gandhi Nagar to Trikuta Nagar, Bakshi Nagar to Sainik Colony — 190+ verified movers in Jammu.

intro: Jammu is the winter capital of J&K and a rapidly expanding city on the Tawi River. ShiftIndia's 190+ verified vendors cover all localities — from densely populated Gandhi Nagar to newer colonies in Trikuta Nagar and Sainik Colony.
whyUs: Jammu's hilly outskirts and proximity to the national highway make inter-city moves efficient. Our vendors are experienced on the Jammu-Delhi and Jammu-Srinagar highway corridors.

faqs.q: Do you cover the outskirts like Nagrota?
faqs.a: Yes — Nagrota, Bari Brahmana, Bishnah and surrounding areas are covered.

faqs.q: What is the local move cost in Jammu?
Do you move to Delhi and Chandigarh?
faqs.a: Yes, highway moves with GPS tracking and ₹5L insurance are available.
